subcodes.first_line: O ye who have quaffed an intoxicating draught from the cup of fidelity to the Covenant!
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرمستان جام الست شکر حضرت قیومرا که در ظل خباء عظیم داخلید و در جنت ابهی
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
